mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sensor_log (equipment_id, temperature, vibration, motor_current, is_anomaly, anomaly_score, fault_type, risk_level, recorded_at) VALUES
(#{it.equipmentId}, #{it.temperature}, #{it.vibration}, #{it.motorCurrent}, #{it.isAnomaly}, #{it.anomalyScore}, #{it.faultType}, #{it.riskLevel}, COALESCE(#{it.recordedAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP))
mapper.select: SELECT date_trunc('minute', recorded_at) - (EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM recorded_at)::int % #{interval}) * INTERVAL '1 minute' AS recorded_at, ROUND(AVG(motor_current)::numeric, 2) AS motor_current, ROUND(AVG(vibration)::numeric, 3) AS vibration, ROUND(AVG(temperature)::numeric, 1) AS temperature FROM sensor_log WHERE equipment_id = #{equipmentId} AND recorded_at >= NOW() - #{hours} * INTERVAL '1 hour' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
